egress_attempts: cd /tmp && rm -rf upstream && timeout 60 git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/eclipse-vertx/vert.x.git upstream 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "CLONE_OK" || echo "CLONE_FAIL"
